summary: Iteration 66: Narrow Ridge Clinical Decision Engine Tests - 25/25 tests PASSED (100%). Verified all 4 ridge classifications (adequate >=6mm, mild_narrow 4.5-6mm, moderate_narrow 3-4.5mm, severe_narrow <3mm), safety rules (bone_envelope, severe_ridge warnings), prosthetic rules (narrow_in_molar, splinting_needed), bone density protocols (D1-D4), blocked flow when ridge<3mm, and integration with suggest/suggest-auto endpoints.
critical_code_review_comments: NARROW_RIDGE_CONFIG correctly defines 4 classification levels with appropriate thresholds
evaluate_narrow_ridge() function properly implements classification, decision logic, safety rules, and prosthetic rules
POST /api/implant-library/evaluate-narrow-ridge endpoint correctly validates input and returns comprehensive evaluation
GET /api/implant-library/suggest correctly includes narrow_ridge_evaluation when bone_width < 6mm
POST /api/implant-library/suggest-auto correctly returns narrow_ridge_blocked=true with empty recommended_systems when bone_width < 3mm
'Narrow Ridge' procedure option correctly appears in procedure-options endpoint with D1-D4 bone compatibility
Bone density drilling protocols (D1-D4) correctly mapped to appropriate drilling techniques
Note: splinting_needed warning requires both implant_diameter_mm AND tooth_region to be set (by design)
seed_data_creation: None - tests use existing implant library data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Narrow Ridge Clinical Decision Engine fully tested. All 4 classifications verified: adequate (>=6mm), mild_narrow (4.5-6mm), moderate_narrow (3-4.5mm), severe_narrow (<3mm). Safety rules (bone_envelope, severe_ridge), prosthetic rules (narrow_in_molar, splinting_needed), bone density protocols (D1-D4), and blocked flow all working correctly. Integration with suggest and suggest-auto endpoints verified.

evaluate_narrow_ridge_endpoint.severe_narrow_classification_less_than_3: PASS - <3mm returns severe_narrow, critical, augmentation_required, blocked=true
evaluate_narrow_ridge_endpoint.narrow_in_molar_warning: PASS - Triggered when diameter<=3.5 and molar region

suggest_auto_endpoint.narrow_ridge_blocked_flow: PASS - bone_width=2.5 returns narrow_ridge_blocked=true, empty recommended_systems
suggest_auto_endpoint.narrow_ridge_procedure_option: PASS - 'Narrow Ridge' as procedure works correctly

procedure_options_endpoint.narrow_ridge_in_procedures_list: PASS - 'Narrow Ridge' appears with D1-D4 compatibility

edge_cases.boundary_3mm_is_moderate_narrow: PASS - Exactly 3mm classified as moderate_narrow (not blocked)
edge_cases.just_below_3mm_is_severe_narrow: PASS - 2.99mm classified as severe_narrow and blocked

tested_endpoints.POST /api/implant-library/evaluate-narro: 200 - All classification, safety, prosthetic, and bone density tests passed
tested_endpoints.POST /api/implant-library/suggest-auto: 200 - Narrow ridge blocked flow and normal response tested
tested_endpoints.GET /api/implant-library/suggest: 200 - Narrow ridge evaluation inclusion logic tested
